query: SELECT p.name AS produto, cg.name AS grupo, ci.name AS complemento, ci.price FROM products p JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.productId = p.id JOIN complementItems ci ON ci.groupId = cg.id WHERE p.id IN (680019, 680020, 680021, 680022, 680023) ORDER BY p.sortOrder, ci.sortOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT p.name AS produto, cg.name AS grupo, ci.name AS complemento, ci.price FROM products p JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.productId = p.id JOIN complementItems ci ON ci.groupId = cg.id WHERE p.id IN (680019, 680020, 680021, 680022, 680023) ORDER BY p.sortOrder, ci.sortOrder;
